---
title: "Mary Grace Latham"
---

## Mary Grace Latham

**Dates:** (1851-1937)

### Description

sister of Diana Latham, daughter of Dr Peter Mere Latham

### Biography

CMY would have known about the Lathams because her friend Margaret Eliza Roberts was their uncle\'s stepdaughter.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 3d [1868]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
